gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX (radeonsi, navi31, LLVM 18.1.8, DRM 3.57, 6.10.3-arch1-2)
notes:
Kalypso launcher doesn't seem to cause any issues, game loads to main menu with no issues, intro cutscene for the first campaign mission works, however once the gameplay starts, the game world does not render properly. 

Tried Proton Experimental and multiple older versions on Desktop, none seemed to resolve the issue.

Interestingly, the issue is not present on Steam Deck.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (radeonsi, navi21, LLVM 18.1.8, DRM 3.59, 6.11.3-arch1-1)
notes: Was able to start game and see main menu, but the background scene's graphics are obscured by a random stretched out texture over the entire screen.
